PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRAY, STAN GRAY, JULIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SMITH, LINDA DBA  CVC TRAVEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
